content.en:
this day.

Ye Tian's copy body, which was targeted by the Lord of the Asahi Sea Realm, finally came out of the Blood Hidden City and returned to the outside world.

Soon after returning to the outside world, a terrifying force descended.

In an instant, his body was shattered.

......

"The Lord of the Xuhai Realm has really done it!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

It seems that 100 billion super-dimensional treasure coins is enough to make a super-dimensional realm excited, after all, killing a half-step super-dimensional realm is just a matter of moving a finger for the super-dimensional realm, and you can easily earn 100 billion super-dimensional treasure coins!

However, the Lord of the Asahi Sea Realm is destined to be disappointed, and there is nothing on that replica body~ There is.

After the Asahi Sea Realm Lord killed Ye Tian's copy body, he checked it again.

"What's going on, nothing, 100 billion - super dimensional treasure coins?"

The Lord of the Asahi Sea Realm was stunned.

He kept staring at Ye Tian, Ye Tian obviously hadn't been in contact with any half-step superdimensional realm, and he hadn't hid in any hidden place, how could the 100 billion superdimensional treasure coins suddenly disappear.

"No, what if he has an accomplice?"

The Lord of the Asahi Sea Realm thought so.

If Ye Tian had an accomplice and passed by his accomplices in Blood Hidden City, it would be possible to transfer 100 billion super dimensional treasure coins.

But there are so many half-step super-dimensional realms, he is not easy to investigate, and even the 100 billion super-dimensional treasure coins have long been transferred to him no longer know how many times.

In other words, it is impossible for him to find out.

"Well, if you can't find it, you can't find it!"

The Lord of the Asahi Sea Realm returned to the Sky Pavilion.

However, he didn't know that he had offended a half-step extradimensional realm with unlimited potential, and he would inevitably invite great disasters in the future.

......

"The Lord of the Xuhai Realm will ignore him for the time being, and when I break through the extradimensional realm in the future, I will kill him!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Right now, he still has to collect the Extradimensional Origin Bead and the Immortal Golden Marrow Bead, which is the most important thing.

Although the Peep Heaven Pavilion was very pitiful, the information given to him was very complete, and it recorded almost all the ways and channels that could obtain the Immortal Golden Marrow Bead and the Extradimensional Origin Bead.

But obviously, there are many ways that he can't do, don't even think about it.

"The Immortal Golden Marrow is only available in a few places in the Six Thousand Territory, and the Immortal Golden Marrow Bead is even rarer, some forces are specifically interfering in the cultivation of the Immortal Golden Marrow Bead, so they can be cultivated, there are too few naturally born Immortal Golden Marrow Beads, many times, the Immortal Golden Marrow Bead has not yet been conceived, and the Immortal Golden Marrow Bead has been taken away, where is the opportunity for a long time to conceive!"

"The extra-dimensional origin bead is even rarer, a super-dimensional realm under the action of a special formation, it takes a long time to be able to give birth to a super-dimensional origin bead, and the birth of a super-dimensional origin bead will consume the origin of the super-dimensional realm, so that the extra-dimensional realm will slowly degrade and even collapse. "

This is an intelligence account.

However, many extra-dimensional forces will enter some weaker territories and secretly arrange special magic circles, so that the origin of the super-dimensional realm will gradually give birth to super-dimensional origin beads, and they will be harvested after a certain period of time.

Basically, any extradimensional realm that is targeted will be marked by extradimensional forces, and other forces will no longer interfere.

"Extra-dimensional realm, extra-dimensional origin bead!"

Ye Tian's face was a little difficult to look at, and he suddenly thought of the Eternal Realm.

The Eternal Realm is the main realm of the 6,362 Extradimensional Realm, and the Eternal Realm was eroded by the Death Void due to a great war, and countless realms have become death zones.

It wasn't until the Kun Realm Wood Stump fell into the Eternal Realm Origin that the Eternal Realm Origin was restored.

In the past, he didn't have much knowledge, and he thought that the origin of the Eternal Realm had been repaired by the Kun Realm Wood Stump.

But now that I think about it carefully, how can a mere medium-sized extra-dimensional thing have this ability!

Now, he had a guess in his mind.

That is, the Eternal Realm was targeted by a super-dimensional force, and a super-dimensional formation was arranged there to cultivate the Transcendental Origin Bead, but the Kun Realm Wood Stump fell into the Eternal Realm, inadvertently destroying a little bit of the Transcendental Formation, causing the Origin of the Eternal Realm to begin to repair itself, and it was no longer absorbed by the Transcendent Formation to condense the Transcendental Origin Bead.

"Maybe I can go in and have a look!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

How to enter the depths of the origin of an extradimensional realm was not easy to do before, but now it is not difficult.

It's just that he didn't bother to explore the depths of the Eternal Realm Origin in the past.

...... []

Eternal borders.

Ye Tian manipulated the power of the extra-dimensional dimension and swiped it casually.

In an instant, he tore through the Origin Barrier of the Eternal Realm and stepped into the Origin in one step.

The origin of the Eternal Realm is incomparably vast, and it also suppresses him, and the closer he gets to the depths, the more he is suppressed.

But Ye Tian was not afraid and continued to go deeper.

0 for flowers, 0 0

At the same time, he was constantly looking for the possible extradimensional formation.

Time passed little by little, and after a long time, an unusual fluctuation attracted Ye Tian.

"There!"

Ye Tian shuttled over, and soon saw a very hidden large array.

This large array was very mysterious, and he couldn't understand it for a while, but he also knew that this large array radiated the origin of the entire Eternal Realm, but it had little impact on the realm of the Realm God Realm and the Demon Seed Abyss.

Moreover, this extra-dimensional array is too hidden, if he hadn't comprehended the super-dimensional power, and the super-dimensional power had reached the Dacheng realm, otherwise it would be difficult to perceive this extra-dimensional array.

The most important thing is that he suspects that there is a formation here, so he will be patient to look for it, otherwise the ordinary extra-dimensional realm will not find here, maybe only the real extra-dimensional realm can easily perceive the formation here.

Immediately, Ye Tian began to study this formation and found that there was a little crack in it, but this crack was currently being repaired at a slow speed, maybe it would not take many extradimensional epochs to repair it.

"Once it's repaired, maybe it will continue to draw on the origin of the Eternal Realm, causing the Eternal Realm to weaken again!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Other than that.

He also sensed a mark on this formation, the mark of a golden six-winged giant bird.

"This mark ......"

Ye Tian felt a little strange, but it was also normal, after all, there were too many extra-dimensional forces, and it was not surprising that he didn't know.

"Wait until you go back and find out which force it is!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

This formation has no defensive ability, otherwise it would not have been affected by a Kun Realm wood stump, and Ye Tian easily escaped into this formation along the origin.

Here, the essence of the extreme emerges, as if it were materialized.

And here, three extra-dimensional origin beads appeared there, and the fourth super-dimensional origin bead had not yet been condensed, but half of it had been condensed.

"Sure enough, there is also a superdimensional origin bead here!"

Ye Tian was not polite, and directly took the third superdimensional origin bead.

As for this fourth extradimensional origin bead, he did not interfere, nor did he destroy this formation, in case the array of formations was destroyed, that force sensed that it was not something he could deal with if he sent a transcendent realm at will.

Therefore, he kept this extra-dimensional formation zero for the time being.
